name: What if my workers comp for chemical exposure gets denied?

mainEntity.name: What if my workers comp for chemical exposure gets denied?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal quickly with stronger evidence and lawyer help.[9]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Appeal within 20-30 days via state board hearing, gathering more medical proof.** Denials often cite lack of causation or pre-existing conditions.[9][2] Factors: insurer bias, incomplete docs. Request claim file, add experts, consider attorney. Persistence overturns many denials.

description: Appeal quickly with stronger evidence and lawyer help.[9]
